title: Is there a way to mirror items?
excerpt:

We are a video production agency with low-level boards and high level boards. Our low level boards are for individual projects …

posts.author: jacksonatarmosa (Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be SO useful for our team to have the ability to mirror items to different boards.

We are a video production agency with low-level boards and high level boards. Our low level boards are for individual projects and our high-level board is for the project manager to use for the entire business.

It would make our jobs so much more efficient if certain low level items could mirror the entire item to a higher level board. This would help our team work more efficiently in different places, but have all the data compiled onto one board that we can use as an overview.
